messages.message: yok da ismi öyle kalmış, onu silmek lazım

Saumya Srivastava (Brevo)
Jul 1, 2025, 13:23 GMT+3
Hi there,
Upon checking the contact in the conversation tab, I wasn't able to find the contact or its conversation. Can you please share the screenshot on where the contact exists in the conversation tab?
Also, please note that if the contact has reached out from any form, the details that he has shared in the form will only be shown in the conversation details.
Looking forward to your response,
Kind regards.
Lets make a playlist together, join and edit: Feeling Good  https://open.spotify.com/playlist/2zPtu1bgAwhpnNBqTjrs7Q?si=f_cj1kdgTIi0gGhTtwKXlw&pt=57ad12b46b496272133c7d969880449e&pi=D73G6SHOSmW3G
Sevgilim 2.si sosyal medya için ama arkası saten kumaş hoşuma gitti
Yapay zeka ile 10 dk sürmedi yapması:))
